spec.goal: Remove the two retired cleanup/review skills from the source repo and installed ~/.codex runtime without leaving broken references or stale registry entries.
success_criteria: the two retired installable source directories are removed from the skills repo
README and routing/scout-skeptic references no longer mention the removed skills
the installed ~/.codex runtime no longer contains those directories or stale sources.json entries for them
constraints: Do not disturb unrelated skill content or the active routing edits already in the retained lane
Keep source-repo and installed-runtime references internally consistent after deletion

tasks.title: Remove source skills and repo references
tasks.objective: Delete the retired installable skill directories from the source repo and clean README/routing references that would otherwise point at missing skills.

tasks.title: Remove installed runtime skills and registry entries
tasks.objective: Delete the corresponding installed skill directories under ~/.codex and remove stale sources.json registry entries for the retired skills.

tasks.title: Verify deletion state
tasks.objective: Confirm the deleted skills are absent, references are cleaned up where intended, and the lane remains syntactically clean.
outputs: Clean verification evidence for source and runtime removal

triggers: Another checked-in skill or runtime registry surface still depends on the removed skills
Deleting the runtime directories requires a different updater workflow than direct removal

evidence: Reused the active chore/routing-trigger-hardening lane because it already carries the adjacent routing cleanup and keeps source edits isolated from the clean primary checkout.
Confirmed both source and installed runtime still contained the two retired skill directories before deletion.
Found live references in source README/scout-skeptic/skill-routing and runtime sources.json that had to be cleaned up alongside directory deletion.
Removed the two retired source skill directories from the lane and deleted the repo-local dev/codebase-review validation directory.
Removed the matching installed ~/.codex skill directories and pruned their sources.json registry entries.

Verification passed: python3 dev/skill-routing/run_smoke.py --runtime-policy /Users/xavier/.codex/skills/skill-routing/child-skill-policy.toml --runtime-skills-root /Users/xavier/.codex/skills, python3 dev/scout-skeptic/run_smoke.py, git diff --check, and targeted rg checks over the remaining source/runtime routing surfaces.
